programs.title: Firebite
programs.desc: Tyson reunites with Shanika after a vampire attacks her; learning that Eleona could help lead them to her mom, Shanika makes a decision to go back down to the lair with Tyson; with Tyson and Shanika gone, the Vampire King attacks the community.

programs.title: Firebite
programs.desc: Survivors of the community reel from the Vampire King's attack as Tyson and Shanika are trapped and chained in the lair with hope fading fast; Eleona faces off with the King, and Tyson makes the ultimate sacrifice to free Shanika.

programs.title: Firebite
programs.desc: Shanika emerges from the collapsed tunnel with her mother; with Rona safe and alive, Shanika goes on the hunt and storms the pub to fight Eleona, only to find herself outnumbered and up against a rabid and wild newly turned vampire Tyson.

programs.title: Interview With the Vampire
programs.desc: Louis de Pointe du Lac lives in 1910 New Orleans as executor-in-charge of his family's fortune; when he meets the vampire Lestat, Louis' life begins to unravel in otherworldly ways; in 2020, Louis tells his story to journalist Daniel Molloy.

programs.title: Interview With the Vampire
programs.sub_title: ...After the Phantoms of Your Former Self
programs.desc: Beginning his life as a vampire, Louis learns the rules of vampirism from his maker and companion Lestat; Louis discovers increasing differences between himself and Lestat; in Dubai, Louis reveals more of his modern-day vampire lifestyle to Molloy.

programs.title: Interview With the Vampire
programs.sub_title: Is My Very Nature That of the Devil
programs.desc: Louis continues his life as a businessman of Storyville; when an old friend comes to town, Louis' relationship with Lestat is tested; Louis' business intertwines with growing tensions in New Orleans, leading to a new chapter in Louis' vampire life.
